versions.version_description: This version adds the intro to the songs, as well as the chords for the instrumental interludes.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: The Little Mermaid - Part Of Your World

content:
Based on Youtube link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YRSmToaXySU
 
4/4
84 bpm
 
[Intro]
[tab]  [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Gsus2[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch]      [ch]Ebadd9[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch] [ch]Fadd9[/ch]  [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch] [ch]Fsus2/Eb[/ch] [ch]Ebmaj7/F[/ch] [ch]F7[/ch]
| •  •      •  •  | •  •     •  •  | •      •   •   •    | •      •        •        •   |[/tab]
 
[tab]  [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Gm[/ch]   [ch]Gsus2[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Gm[/ch]   [ch]Gsus2[/ch]
| •  •  •      •  | •  •  •     •  | •  •  •      •  | •  •  •     •  |[/tab]
 
[Verse 1]
[tab]    [ch]Bb[/ch]            [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]             [ch]Gm[/ch]     [ch]Gsus2[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch]
You think you own whatever land you land on[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bb[/ch]            [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]
the earth is just a dead thing you can claim[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]               [ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]Cm/Eb[/ch]      [ch]Bbadd9/D[/ch]
But I know every rock and tree and creature[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Cm[/ch]         [ch]Dm/F[/ch]         [ch]Gm[/ch]       [ch]F6[/ch]
has a life, has a spirit, has a name[/tab]
 
[tab]    [ch]Bb[/ch]            [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]           [ch]Gm[/ch]     [ch]Gsus2[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch]
You think the only people who are people[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]        [ch]Dm[/ch]
are the people who look and think like you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Gm[/ch]              [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]Cm/Eb[/ch]     [ch]Bb/D[/ch]
But if you walk the footsteps of a stranger[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Cm[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Eb/F[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]Dm/A[/ch]
you'll learn things you never knew,     you never knew[/tab]
 
[Chorus 1]
[tab]         [ch]Gm[/ch]                             [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]Eb6[/ch]
Have you ever heard the wolf cry to the blue corn moon[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Gm[/ch]                               [ch]Dm7[/ch]
or asked the grinning bobcat why he grinned?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Eb[/ch]                [ch]F/Eb[/ch]          [ch]Dm7[/ch]       [ch]F/G[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Can you sing with all the voices of the mountain?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Cm/Eb[/ch]              [ch]Bbadd9/D[/ch]      [ch]Gm7add11[/ch]
Can you paint with all the colors of the wind?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Cm7[/ch]                [ch]Eb/F[/ch]          ([ch]Bb[/ch])
Can you paint with all the colors of the wind?[/tab]
 
[Interlude]
[tab]  [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Dm/F[/ch] [ch]F/Eb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
| •  •      •  •  | •  •    •    •  |[/tab]
 
[Verse 2]
[tab]     [ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]Gm[/ch]     [ch]Eb[/ch]
Come run the hidden pine trails of the forest[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bb[/ch]                                 [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Come taste the sun sweet berries of the earth[/tab]
[tab][ch]D7/F#[/ch]      [ch]Gm[/ch]              [ch]Dm/F[/ch]         [ch]Cm/Eb[/ch]      [ch]Bb/D[/ch]
      Come roll in all the riches all around you[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Cm7[/ch]        [ch]Bb/F[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]Gm[/ch]          [ch]Fadd9/A[/ch] [ch]F/A[/ch]
And for once never wonder what they're worth[/tab]
 
[tab]    [ch]Bb[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]Gm[/ch]        [ch]Ebadd9[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch]
The rainstorm and the river are my brothers[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bb[/ch]                        [ch]Dm7[/ch]
The heron and the otter are my friends[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Gm[/ch]           [ch]Dm/F[/ch]      [ch]Cm/Eb[/ch]     [ch]Bbadd9/D[/ch] [ch]Bb/D[/ch]
And we are all connected to each other[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Cm7[/ch]          [ch]Eb/F[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]
In a circle, in a hoop that never ends[/tab]
 
[Chorus 2]
[tab]         [ch]Gm7[/ch]                            [ch]Dm7[/ch]       [ch]Ebadd9[/ch]
Have you ever heard the wolf cry to the blue corn moon[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Gm7[/ch]                          [ch]Dm7[/ch]
or let the eagle tell you where he's been?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Eb[/ch]                [ch]F/Eb[/ch]          [ch]Dm7[/ch]       [ch]F/G[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Can you sing with all the voices of the mountain?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Cm/Eb[/ch]              [ch]Bbadd9/D[/ch]      [ch]Gm7add11[/ch]
Can you paint with all the colors of the wind?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Cm7[/ch]                [ch]Eb/F[/ch]          [ch]Bbadd9[/ch]
Can you paint with all the colors of the wind?[/tab]
 
[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]F/Eb[/ch]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]          [ch]F/G[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch]
How... high... does the sycamore grow?[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Eb/F[/ch]    [ch]F6[/ch]   [ch]Eb/F[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
If you cut it down, then you'll never know.[/tab]
 
[Chorus 3]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]Gm7[/ch]                            [ch]Dm7[/ch]       [ch]Ebadd9[/ch]
And you'll never hear the wolf cry to the blue corn moon[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Gm7[/ch]                           [ch]Dm7[/ch]
  For whether we are white or copper skinned[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]            [ch]Fadd9/A[/ch] [ch]F/A[/ch]       [ch]Dm7[/ch]         [ch]Gm7[/ch]
We need to sing with all the voices      of the mountains[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Cm7[/ch]               [ch]Bbadd9/D[/ch]      [ch]Gm7add11[/ch]
We need to paint with all the colors of the wind[/tab]
 
[tab]        [ch]Cm7[/ch]                                 [ch]Bbsus2/D[/ch]       [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]
You can own the Earth and still, all you'll own is earth until.......[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Gm7[/ch]           [ch]Fadd4/D[/ch]  [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Eb6/F[/ch]    ([ch]Bb[/ch])
You can paint... with all the colors... of, the wind......[/tab]
 
[Outro]
[tab]  [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Gsus2[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch]      [ch]Ebadd9[/ch]    [ch]Gm7[/ch] [ch]Fadd9[/ch]  [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch] [ch]Eb/F[/ch]            N.C.          [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]
| •  •      •  •  | •  •     •  •  | •     •   •   •    | •      •    •    •   | •  •  •  •  | •[/tab]
